channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Door dumped, 22nd March
item.description:
A door has been left in the now regular place. It’s getting really frustrating. I’ve reported this location as a regular place that people keep leaving stuff to Enviro crime and local councillors and have been completely ignored. Please please please can something be done? Signage? Anything?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burwash Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Enormous deep potholes in cycle lane, 22nd March
item.description:
Extremely dangerous ... The whole of this stretch of road for about half a mile is a patchwork of potholes and poor repairs but this one is a serious and growing hazard. A cyclist has no chance if they hit this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich Park Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish build up, 22nd March
item.description:
Bin is slightly broken and refuse men turned it Upside down over a week ago and rubbish is now pilling up on top of it attracting pests

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Walk, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 27 Mapesbury Rd, 22nd March
item.description:
Several deep potholes in close proximity to each other

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mapesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various smallish items dumped in the alleyway, 22nd March
item.description:
2 bags of rubbish. A wooden box and other small items
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cantwell Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 78 Brondesbury villas, 22nd March
item.description:
A lot of stuff

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Smashed mirror, 22nd March
item.description:
Smashing and dumped mirror

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Llanover Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip Hazard, 22nd March
item.description:
These bricks have been dislodged for 10 months and at least 2 people have tripped and fallen flat. One person had to have the paramedics called. It is in Kelsey Park, outside the Information Centre in the front. The bricks need to be cemented into their correct position.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spoiling graffiti, 22nd March
item.description:
Gradual build-up or graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 415, Wandsworth Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on a double yellow line, 22nd March
item.description:
Parking on a double yellow line

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement cleaning needed, 22nd March
item.description:
The pavement is filthy where the bins were previously stored. Please can the pavement be cleaned?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brownswood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On grassy area, adjacent to Plympton Avenue, 22nd March
item.description:
Fly tipping of various large garden pots and other waste. Further up the path, still on the grass, there is also a wooden pallet.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag (Estates)

item.title: Street drain full of soil, 22nd March
item.description:
The street drain is full of soil. I tried to dig with a stick, but it's more than 5 cm deep, so I fear it requires more work to unblock it. Thanks!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Craigton Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandon Lime Bikes, 22nd March
item.description:
There are six lime bikes that have been left for the past two days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chilver Street, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
